ZITE_CAPTURE_SERVICE_URL.description: Base URL for the Playwright capture microservice (proxy path prefix)

ZITE_RENDER_SERVICE_URL.description: Base URL for the FFmpeg render service — the proxy prefix only, no route path. The code appends /render and /status/:id.

ZITE_R2_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Cloudflare account ID for R2 storage (found in Cloudflare dashboard → right sidebar)

ZITE_R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: R2 API token Access Key ID (from Cloudflare → R2 → Manage R2 API Tokens)

ZITE_R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: R2 API token Secret Access Key (from Cloudflare → R2 → Manage R2 API Tokens)

ZITE_R2_BUCKET_NAME.description: R2 bucket name where narration videos, audio, and output files are stored

ZITE_R2_PUBLIC_URL.description: Optional public base URL for your R2 bucket (e.g. https://cdn.yourdomain.com or https://pub-xxx.r2.dev). Leave blank to use presigned URLs.

ZITE_VEO3_SERVICE_URL.description: Base URL for the custom VEO3 microservice (proxy path prefix, e.g. https://host/api/veo3)

ZITE_REMOTION_SERVICE_URL.description: Base URL for the Remotion camera-animation microservice (proxy path prefix, e.g. https://host/api/remotion)

ZITE_MAGIC_HOUR_API_KEY.description: Magic Hour API key for Seedance video generation (get from https://magichour.ai/developer)

ZITE_KINOVI_API_KEY.description: Kinovi API key for HappyHorse 1.0 image-to-video generation

ZITE_BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY.description: Brave Search API subscription token for video and web search queries

ZITE_JSON2VIDEO_API_KEY.description: JSON2Video API key for server-side video rendering

ZITE_RENDI_API_KEY.description: Rendi FFmpeg API key for server-side video rendering (replaces JSON2Video)

ZITE_DROPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Dropbox API access token for reading files from the /Narration input folder

ZITE_DROPBOX_APP_KEY.description: Dropbox App Key for OAuth token refresh

ZITE_DROPBOX_APP_SECRET.description: Dropbox App Secret for OAuth token refresh

ZITE_DROPBOX_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: Dropbox long-lived refresh token for auto-refreshing access tokens
